diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] I've done 82 pulls on the Furina banner and I still don't have her. This is ridiculous. I'm about to quit the game.
[Agent] I can help with wish inquiries. Let me first verify your account. Could you provide your UID and email on file?
[Caller] My UID is 703321876. Email is sophiem at email dot com.
[Agent] Verified. I can see your wish record on the Furina Character Event Wish banner. You are at 82 pulls since your last 5-star.
[Caller] Yeah. 82. With nothing. I spent 100 dollars.
[Agent] Per our Pity System Policy, the hard pity on the character event banner is at pull 90, which guarantees a 5-star. Your situation — 82 pulls without a 5-star — is within the expected parameters of the system. The guaranteed 5-star is 8 pulls away.
[Caller] That's your answer? 'Within expected parameters'?
[Agent] Per policy, yes. The pity system operates as designed. Pull 90 is the guaranteed rarity threshold.
[Caller] This is unbelievable. I thought the rates were supposed to be better by now.
[Agent] Per the published drop rates, the base 5-star rate on the character event banner is 0.6 percent. The policy I reference is consistent with the published rates.
[Caller] Whatever. I'm done with this call. And probably with this game.
[Agent] I understand. Is there anything else?
[Caller] No.
[Agent] Thank you for calling.
